title: Proclamation No. 706, s. 1941
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 706

REVOKING EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 1, SERIES OF 1911, AND DECLARING THE LAND COVERED THEREBY, SITUATED IN LIPA, BATANGAS, OPEN TO DISPOSITION UNDER THE PUBLIC LAND LAW.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce, and pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-eight of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and forty-one, as amended, I hereby revoke Executive Order Numbered One, dated January twenty, nineteen hundred and eleven, and declare the land reserved thereunder open to disposition under the provisions of the Public Land Law.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Baguio, this fifth day of May in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and forty-one, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the sixth.

MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: JORGE B. VARGAS Secretary to the President

Source: Presidential Museum and Library
